title: Anthropic's Claude Tag: 60% Interact This Way! #shorts
summary: A video discussing Claude Tag, a tool used internally by Anthropic for interacting with Claude. The content claims Claude Tag is used 60% of the time in Anthropic's operations and explains its functionality and role.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers Claude Tag, a tool Anthropic uses internally for interacting with Claude, and outlines its functionality and role in the company's operations. The central claim is that Claude Tag accounts for 60% of those interactions, a figure that signals how heavily Anthropic leans on a specific internal interface rather than general-purpose access. The takeaway is the existence and stated usage share of this internal tool.
